_description: ServiceNow module UI error messages. Self-contained — no dependency on platform UIErrors.json.

connection.testFailed: Connection test failed. Check your credentials and instance URL.

incidents.fetchFailed: Failed to load incidents from the server.
incidents.searchFailed: Search request failed. Please try again.

reports.fetchFailed: Failed to load reports data from the server.

sync.syncFailed: Data synchronization failed. Check the connection.
